Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 14th, 2007 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: January 15th, 2008 by New Line Home Video

Running Time: 87 minutes
Plot point: Bad Teachers, Bullies, Dysfunctional Family, High School Hell, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Widow/Widower, Writing and Writers

Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy

Production Countries: United States
